checks.description: After any minute or hour rollover event, the outputs Hours, Mins, and Secs must not contain X or Z values.
checks.pass_condition: When a wrap from 59 to 0 occurs on Secs (or on Mins/Hours), the resulting output values are fully defined (no X/Z).
checks.trigger_condition: Whenever a wrap condition is detected on Secs, Mins, or Hours.

checks.description: Seconds increment by 1 each rising edge of CLK until reaching 59, then wrap to 0; when Secs wraps, Minutes increment by 1; when Minutes and Secs both wrap, Hours increment by 1; Hours wrap from 23 back to 0 after a full day cycle.
checks.pass_condition: Across consecutive clock edges, the relationship between Hours, Mins, and Secs follows the described counting and wrap behavior without violating defined value constraints.
checks.trigger_condition: On each rising edge of CLK after reset deassertion.
